narrative:
Union Twp township has 1,837 registered voters, with 59.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.6 percentage points.
